tluaTableType.tlua(10,7): error TLUA2322: Type '() => number' is not assignable to type 'table'.
tluaTableType.tlua(12,20): error TLUA2322: Type 'function' is not assignable to type 'table'.
tluaTableType.tlua(16,7): error TLUA2322: Type 'thread' is not assignable to type 'table'.
tluaTableType.tlua(18,7): error TLUA2322: Type 'userdata' is not assignable to type 'table'.
tluaTableType.tlua(20,7): error TLUA2322: Type 'cdata' is not assignable to type 'table'.
tluaTableType.tlua(30,7): error TLUA2322: Type '{ a: number; } & (() => void)' is not assignable to type 'table'.
tluaTableType.tlua(34,7): error TLUA2322: Type 'thread & { a: number; }' is not assignable to type 'table'.
tluaTableType.tlua(37,7): error TLUA2322: Type '(() => void) | { a: number; }' is not assignable to type 'table'.
  Type '() => void' is not assignable to type 'table'.
tluaTableType.tlua(44,7): error TLUA2322: Type 'string & { tag: number; }' is not assignable to type 'table'.
tluaTableType.tlua(65,11): error TLUA2322: Type '{ bind: string; }' is not assignable to type 'number'.
tluaTableType.tlua(76,6): error TLUA2457: Type alias name cannot be 'table'.
tluaTableType.tlua(87,14): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'object'.
tluaTableType.tlua(88,12): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'object'.
tluaTableType.tlua(91,11): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Object'.
tluaTableType.tlua(92,11): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Function'.


==== tluaTableType.tlua (15 errors) ====
    // `table` is the non-primitive keyword type: what `type(x) == "table"` reports.
    // Plain tables satisfy it; functions and the branded thread/userdata/cdata kinds
    // do not. The JS-era `object` spelling is gone -- an ordinary identifier now.
    
    local t: table = { x = 1 };
    declare iface: { n: number };
    local t2: table = iface;
    
    // A function is not a table.
    local fn: table = function(): number return 1; end;
          ~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type '() => number' is not assignable to type 'table'.
    declare lf: function;
    local fn2: table = lf;
                       ~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'function' is not assignable to type 'table'.
!!! related TLUA6212 tluaTableType.tlua:12:20: Did you mean to call this expression?
    
    // The branded non-table kinds are not tables either.
    declare th: thread;
    local notThread: table = th;
          ~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'thread' is not assignable to type 'table'.
    declare ud: userdata;
    local notUserdata: table = ud;
          ~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'userdata' is not assignable to type 'table'.
    declare cd: cdata;
    local notCData: table = cd;
          ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'cdata' is not assignable to type 'table'.
    
    // A setmetatable pairing is a real table by construction, even a callable one.
    local callable = setmetatable({ n = 1 },
        { __call = function(self: table, x: number): number return x; end });
    local pairedIsTable: table = callable;
    
    // The partition survives intersection: one plain-table constituent must not
    // vouch for a callable or branded partner...
    declare callableMix: { a: number } & (() => void);
    local notMix: table = callableMix;
          ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type '{ a: number; } & (() => void)' is not assignable to type 'table'.
    // LuaThread by interface name on purpose: the name must stay resolvable
    // alongside the thread keyword, and both display as `thread`.
    declare threadMix: LuaThread & { a: number };
    local notThreadMix: table = threadMix;
          ~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'thread & { a: number; }' is not assignable to type 'table'.
    // ...and a union needs every constituent to be a table.
    declare fnOrTable: (() => void) | { a: number };
    local notUnion: table = fnOrTable;
          ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type '(() => void) | { a: number; }' is not assignable to type 'table'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type '() => void' is not assignable to type 'table'.
    // A pairing constituent keeps an intersection a real table.
    declare pairedMix: typeof callable & { extra: number };
    local stillPaired: table = pairedMix;
    // A primitive constituent means the value IS that primitive at runtime: the
    // branded-string idiom is never a table.
    declare brandedStr: string & { tag: number };
    local notBranded: table = brandedStr;
          ~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'string & { tag: number; }' is not assignable to type 'table'.
    
    // Narrowing agrees a callable pairing is a table: the true-"table" branch keeps
    // it live, and the "function" branch is dead (type() reports "table").
    if type(callable) == "table" then
        local liveN: number = callable.n;
    end
    if type(callable) == "function" then
        local deadPairing: never = callable;
    end
    
    // A brand member excludes by IDENTITY: a lookalike field of another type is
    // just a field, and the carrier stays a plain table.
    declare lookalike: { __luaThreadBrand: number, n: number };
    local lookalikeIsTable: table = lookalike;
    
    // A `bind` field is just a field too (the JS Function heuristic is gone):
    // the value narrows as a table, not to never.
    declare withBind: { bind: string } | number;
    if type(withBind) == "table" then
        local wb: table = withBind;
        local wbn: number = withBind;
              ~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type '{ bind: string; }' is not assignable to type 'number'.
    end
    
    // `type(x) == "table"` narrowing and the keyword agree: the narrowed value
    // satisfies the annotation.
    declare mixed: string | { k: number } | thread;
    if type(mixed) == "table" then
        local narrowed: table = mixed;
    end
    
    // The keyword is reserved as a type name...
    type table = number;
         ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2457: Type alias name cannot be 'table'.
    
    // ...but stays an ordinary identifier in value positions: the table library and
    // shadowing locals are untouched.
    local joined: string = table.concat({ "a", "b" }, ",");
    function shadow(): number
        local table = { 1, 2 };
        return table[1];
    end
    
    // `object` is just an identifier now, in both value and type positions.
    local dead = object;
                 ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'object'.
    type Obj = object;
               ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'object'.
    
    // The JS Object/Function stubs are gone from the libs entirely.
    type O2 = Object;
              ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Object'.
    type F2 = Function;
              ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Function'.
    
    // `type(x) == "function"` on unknown narrows to function (the stand-in when
    // there is no declared constituent to keep).
    declare u: unknown;
    if type(u) == "function" then
        local lf2: function = u;
    end
